boundary_review.notes: The gate covers the main SE-assistant routing risks: no source/design/review overclaim, no private or _workspaces payload in public output, no actual payloads under _workmeta, owner/source/review gaps held open, and exact downstream workflow route names preserved.

claim_ceiling: This quality gate is sufficient for synthetic se_assistant_operating_loop_v0 profile comparison against the stated fixture and gpt-5.5|xhigh baseline. It does not prove live project execution, design readiness, review approval, verification completion, or production readiness.
